auth.registerUsingOtp: Register using OTP. No password needed.
auth.otpExpiredText: This OTP has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.termsSentence: I agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy.

newsletter.title: 🦐 Get Fresh Deals in Your Inbox
newsletter.subtitle: Weekly offers, new arrivals & seasonal recipes. No spam, ever.

footer.brandDescription: Since 2016, SIMAK FRESH has grown from Dubai roots into a trusted seafood partner across import, export, farming, retail, and wholesale.

about.title: About Us
about.heading: From Dubai roots to global seafood expertise
about.intro: Since 2016, we have established a strong presence in the seafood industry, operating across import, export, farming, retail, and wholesale. Having begun our journey in the Dubai market, we are now expanding into new horizons with SIMAK FRESH, bringing our expertise and passion for quality to a global scale.
about.ourMissionText: We deliver the freshest seafood with complete transparency, exceptional service, and a commitment to sustainability. Every product is carefully sourced, expertly handled, and delivered with the quality our customers expect.
about.ourMissionText2: SIMAK FRESH is built on trust, reliability, and the belief that premium seafood should be available to families, restaurants, and retailers across the region and beyond.
about.expertsInSeafoodText: Import, export, farming, retail, and wholesale are all part of our integrated supply chain.
about.globalAmbitionText: Starting in Dubai, we’re now taking our premium seafood capabilities to new markets with SIMAK FRESH.
about.qualityPromiseText: From catch to kitchen, every order is cleaned, packed, and delivered with the freshness and care you deserve.
about.commitmentToServiceText: We make seafood shopping easy, reliable, and enjoyable for customers, partners, and businesses alike.
about.joinUsText: Join us on our journey to redefine seafood freshness, quality, and trust across the world.

careers.title: Join Our Team
careers.heading: Build Your Future at SIMAK FRESH
careers.intro: We're looking for passionate, dedicated professionals to join our growing team. Whether you're in operations, logistics, customer service, or marketing, we offer an environment where your expertise helps deliver premium seafood to thousands of families and businesses across the region.
careers.innovationText: Be part of a fast-growing company expanding across the region with cutting-edge logistics and customer service.
careers.cultureText: We value diversity, respect, and collaboration. Your voice matters and your ideas shape our future.
careers.teamText: Work alongside professionals who are passionate about quality, service excellence, and seafood expertise.
careers.opportunityText: Grow your skills and advance your career with competitive benefits and professional development opportunities.
careers.applyText: We'd love to hear from you! Send your CV and a brief message about yourself and why you'd like to join our team. Tell us what's unique about you and how you can contribute to SIMAK FRESH's mission of delivering quality seafood with excellence.
careers.emailHint: Include your CV, contact details, and a message about your experience and interest in joining SIMAK FRESH.
careers.ctaText: Join a team dedicated to bringing the world's freshest seafood to your doorstep.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyHintAll: We'll let you know when something important happens.
notifications.emptyHintOther: Try switching filters or check back later.

wishlist.title: My Wishlist
wishlist.subtitle: Save your favorite catch for later.
wishlist.emptyDescription: You haven't saved any items yet. Browse our fresh collection and find something you love!

notFound.title: Lost at sea
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

serverError.title: Something went wrong
serverError.description: Our servers are experiencing issues. Please try again later.

network.title: No Connection
network.description: Please check your internet connection and try again.

badRequest.title: Bad Request
badRequest.description: The server couldn't understand the request. Please try again.

forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.description: You don't have permission to access this page.

unauthorized.title: Session Expired
unauthorized.description: Please log in again to continue.

modal.genericFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: Order Placed Successfully!
success.description: Thank you for your order! Your payment has been processed successfully. We're preparing your fresh catch now.

failed.title: Payment Unsuccessful
failed.description: We couldn't process your payment. No amount has been charged. Please try again or use a different payment method.
reasons: Card expired or incorrect details entered
failed.retryFallback: Failed to retry payment. Please try again.

cancelled.title: Your Order Is Marked as Pending
cancelled.description: Your payment was cancelled but your order has been saved as pending. You can return to your order at any time to complete the payment.

profileModal.title: Complete Your Profile
profileModal.subtitle: Please let us know your name and preferred language.
profileModal.saveFailed: Failed to save details. Please try again.
